risk_description: Unauthorized access to production databases via compromised credentials
treatment_plan: Implemented MFA for all database access, privileged access management via CyberArk, quarterly access reviews
notes: Treatment plan on track. Zero unauthorized access incidents in Q4.

treatment_plan: DLP solution deployed (Symantec), USB device restrictions, email content filtering, user behavior analytics (Exabeam)
notes: UBA alerting tuned in Q3. Two false positives in Q4 investigated and cleared.

risk_description: Production system outage due to infrastructure failure
treatment_plan: Multi-AZ deployment, auto-scaling, automated failover, DR site in us-west-2 with quarterly DR tests
notes: Q4 DR test completed successfully. RTO achieved in 38 minutes.

risk_description: Non-compliance with GDPR data subject rights requirements
treatment_plan: Automated DSR portal deployed, data mapping completed, 30-day response SLA monitored, DPO appointed (Patricia Holloway)
notes: 14 DSRs processed in Q4. All within 30-day window.

risk_description: Critical vendor service disruption (cloud hosting provider)
treatment_plan: AWS Enterprise Support with dedicated TAM, Business Associate Agreement, cyber insurance policy covers cloud outage losses up to $5M
notes: AWS SLA credit of $4200 claimed for Direct Connect outage in Nov.

treatment_plan: EDR (CrowdStrike Falcon) on all endpoints, network segmentation, immutable backups, incident response retainer with Mandiant, quarterly tabletop exercises
notes: Tabletop exercise completed Dec 10. Response time improved to 22 minutes from 35 minutes in Q3.

risk_description: Loss of key personnel in security team
treatment_plan: Cross-training program, documented runbooks, knowledge management system, competitive retention packages
notes: Two new security analysts onboarded in Q4. Cross-training completion at 75%.

risk_description: Software supply chain compromise via malicious dependency
treatment_plan: Snyk SCA scanning in CI/CD, dependency pinning, private artifact registry (Artifactory), SBOM generation for all releases
notes: OVERDUE: Last reviewed April 2025. Supply chain scanning operational but review not conducted per quarterly schedule.

risk_description: State-level privacy law compliance gaps (CCPA/CPRA amendments)
treatment_plan: Legal team monitoring legislative changes, privacy program updates scheduled quarterly, consent management platform (OneTrust)
notes: OVERDUE: Last reviewed May 2025. OneTrust configuration updates pending for new CPRA amendment requirements.

risk_description: Cloud misconfiguration leading to data exposure
treatment_plan: CSPM tool (Wiz) deployed, automated remediation for critical misconfigurations, weekly configuration drift reports, infrastructure-as-code enforcement
notes: Wiz identified and auto-remediated 3 S3 bucket policy deviations in Q4.

treatment_plan: Auto-scaling database read replicas, query performance monitoring (Datadog APM), quarterly capacity planning reviews
notes: P95 query latency stable at 45ms. Capacity headroom at 40%.

treatment_plan: 24/7 SOC (hybrid: internal + Arctic Wolf MDR), IR playbooks for top 10 scenarios, Mandiant retainer, quarterly tabletop exercises
notes: Mean time to detect improved to 8 minutes from 14 minutes in Q3.

risk_description: Vendor data breach affecting shared customer data
treatment_plan: Vendor security assessments (annual), contractual data protection requirements, vendor risk monitoring (BitSight), data processing agreements
notes: OVERDUE: Last reviewed March 2025. Annual vendor assessments for 2025 cycle not yet completed for 4 of 12 critical vendors.

risk_description: Regulatory fine for cross-border data transfer non-compliance (Schrems II)
treatment_plan: After extensive legal analysis and consultation with EU counsel (Fieldfisher LLP), determined that current Standard Contractual Clauses and supplementary technical measures (encryption, pseudonymization) meet adequacy requirements. Residual risk accepted due to ongoing regulatory uncertainty. Cyber liability insurance covers regulatory fines up to $10M.
notes: Exception EXC-2025-019 approved by CISO and Board. Quarterly review scheduled. Insurance coverage confirmed with Beazley (Policy: CL-2025-VAC-0042).

risk_description: API gateway single point of failure
treatment_plan: Redundant API gateway cluster (Kong Enterprise), health check monitoring, automatic failover, rate limiting

risk_description: Phishing attack leading to credential compromise
treatment_plan: Security awareness training (KnowBe4), phishing simulation monthly, email gateway filtering (Proofpoint), MFA enforcement on all applications
notes: NO OWNER ASSIGNED. Q4 phishing simulation click rate: 4.2% (down from 7.1% in Q3). Training completion rate 94%.

treatment_plan: DMARC/DKIM/SPF enforced, executive email protection (Proofpoint TAP), wire transfer verification procedures (dual approval + callback)
notes: NO OWNER ASSIGNED. One BEC attempt detected and blocked in November via Proofpoint TAP.

risk_description: Legacy application vulnerabilities in customer portal v2
treatment_plan: Web application firewall (Cloudflare WAF), quarterly penetration testing, virtual patching for known CVEs, migration to v3 platform planned for Q2 2026
notes: Pentest completed Dec 2. Three medium findings remediated. Migration timeline confirmed for Q2 2026.
